# Events

::: tip See also
For an introduction to event handling patterns, see the [Events guide](/guide/introduction/working-with-events.html).
:::

## Lifecycle events

### `mounted`

Emitted when the instance is mounted.

```js twoslash
// @twoslash-cache: {"v":1,"hash":"e091a819fd70d4c6aa762518c34a46f870dde4ea2f7256e3a0b5d67f5af26e00","data":""}
import { Base } from '@studiometa/js-toolkit';

class App extends Base {
  static config = {
    name: 'App',
  };
}

const app = new App(document.body);

app.$on('mounted', () => {
  console.log('App is mounted');
});
```

### `updated`

```js twoslash
// @twoslash-cache: {"v":1,"hash":"6d12bba04d835728554c88730fa0ba738b424b587579fd790876fad405f97c64","data":""}
import { Base } from '@studiometa/js-toolkit';

class App extends Base {
  static config = {
    name: 'App',
  };
}

const app = new App(document.body);

app.$on('updated', () => {
  console.log('$update() has been called on this component');
});
```

### `destroyed`

```js twoslash
// @twoslash-cache: {"v":1,"hash":"2db7187c6f00e9171a656fe893fd069b979ae0ff921f8477841934b366fd778e","data":""}
import { Base } from '@studiometa/js-toolkit';

class App extends Base {
  static config = {
    name: 'App',
  };
}

const app = new App(document.body);

app.$on('destroyed', () => {
  console.log('$destroy() has been called on this component');
});
```

### `terminated`

```js twoslash
// @twoslash-cache: {"v":1,"hash":"cf56b882e8fac7ee3d732f7a1b6b9e27f0630f6b53a3384555f20f0773c605e0","data":""}
import { Base } from '@studiometa/js-toolkit';

class App extends Base {
  static config = {
    name: 'App',
  };
}

const app = new App(document.body);

app.$on('terminated', () => {
  console.log('$terminate() has been called on this component');
});
```

## Services events

### `keyed`

```js twoslash
// @twoslash-cache: {"v":1,"hash":"ccfed257bb74472240913608d60630b42f86f654759edcaf349633a23d97a52b","data":""}
import { Base } from '@studiometa/js-toolkit';

class App extends Base {
  static config = {
    name: 'App',
  };
}

const app = new App(document.body);

app.$on('keyed', () => {
  console.log('User is typing');
});
```

### `moved`

```js twoslash
// @twoslash-cache: {"v":1,"hash":"4b9cfb1138a280dd6dd25e4acb70e335721741846f37bd75161ed925dfd3d909","data":""}
import { Base } from '@studiometa/js-toolkit';

class App extends Base {
  static config = {
    name: 'App',
  };
}

const app = new App(document.body);

app.$on('moved', () => {
  console.log('User is moving their cursor');
});
```

### `resized`

```js twoslash
// @twoslash-cache: {"v":1,"hash":"a7b91f15f0e3f34e4bed59a5948bb8563588027b8f2a6a4d09359231e9cd1d63","data":""}
import { Base } from '@studiometa/js-toolkit';

class App extends Base {
  static config = {
    name: 'App',
  };
}

const app = new App(document.body);

app.$on('resized', () => {
  console.log('User is resizing the window');
});
```

### `scrolled`

```js twoslash
// @twoslash-cache: {"v":1,"hash":"299f329d2580f26b4bb0722c200a146f31de373cd47da607af6a41de7e3bce15","data":""}
import { Base } from '@studiometa/js-toolkit';

class App extends Base {
  static config = {
    name: 'App',
  };
}

const app = new App(document.body);

app.$on('scrolled', () => {
  console.log('User is scrolling');
});
```

### `ticked`

```js twoslash
// @twoslash-cache: {"v":1,"hash":"25680bc6dbafe0088888a4dfd244ccc5155ade7599da4acfb945ac8bf3bbcdb2","data":""}
import { Base } from '@studiometa/js-toolkit';

class App extends Base {
  static config = {
    name: 'App',
  };
}

const app = new App(document.body);

app.$on('ticked', () => {
  console.log('The render loop has ticked');
});
```
